title: Mine Little Pony -  Equestrian Lives & Tails!
description: Taking Mine Little Pony & Minecraft Comes Alive REBORN and finally putting it together!
body:
**Hello Everypony!**


After 6 months of long hard work ive got the foundation for the

**Mine Little Pony Minecraft Comes Alive mod!**

-------------------------------

I decided to make this primarilly for our MC server 

PonyCraft - Friendship is Magic and Exploration



As a notice the MCA-MLP Mod are being made by ONE person! I also personally run the MC server on my Own!

**Also please stop asking for the sourcecode. I refuse to let anyone else but myself and who I work with- work on this, This includes refusing to let people try to make their own adjustments to the mod. I am kind enough to share this mod publically despite it being made privately for my server. But I am not willing to compromise the integrity of the mod, as many people have expressed malicious ulterior motives to the mod if they got access to the sourcecode.** (This also includes even if u dont have ulterior motives, I cannot risk the sourcecode being leaked.)

**------------
Currently in the mod
----------------**

Entire list of Ponies in the mod from [https://github.com/MineLittlePony/Community-Skin-Pack/tree/master/Background%20Ponies](https://github.com/MineLittlePony/Community-Skin-Pack/tree/master/Background%20Ponies)



Over 600 names Taken both from the Background pony cast and additional custom names



FULL MCA INTERACTION Capabilities: Friendship, Bestfriends, Marriage, Procreation, Having Traits/Personality, Become a Mayor!, Talk/Interact, Can Work





You can get details about the Mod or Modpack for the server here - (https://disboard.org/server/1228087770887491757)

Additionally as well the Ponycraft MC Server will also always have the Early Access/New Content AKA the GENETICS UPDATE as soon as it drops


**----------------
Core Mechanics NOT in the Mod (Yet)
---------------------**

Outfit customization and variations, for a diverse and fulfilling wardrobe



Generated, layered skins; our unique and innovative genetic system will allow for hundreds of billions of unique NPC and Player pony skins

---------------------------------------------------

 **If you like this MOD and want to support me further developing it (Genetics, New Versions or even ADD YOUR OWN SKIN to the Next Update**

 Please do checkout our PATREON!     [https://www.patreon.com/MLP_MC_ADDONS] Or dm me on Discord to add your skin - Alternatively you can Donate to our Ko-fi [https://ko-fi.com/ponycraft](https://ko-fi.com/ponycraft)

 **YOU NEED MINE LITTLE PONY  AND MINECRAFT COMES ALIVE INSTALLED TO USE THIS MOD IT WILL JUST RANDOMLY CRASH IF IT DOESNT !**
